creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Filla from comment #5)

A committer informed me about this illadvised Makefile setup of mine, my bad.

Tried to build POCL 4 on CURRENT, but devel/llvm16 fails due to an error (will file PR). Sorry, I'd like to check whether the issue reported on 14.2 is due to a bad/outdated pkg-plist.
